description: Opportunity-type registry (the report tabs) plus per-type discovery hints and dynamic-discovery rules. Loop 4 assigns each opportunity exactly one type. Loop 6 may PROPOSE a new product-specific channel type (gated). The report builds its filter tabs from the live registry persisted in gtm_plan.json:channel_types, so discovered types render automatically.

channel_types.label: Influencers
channel_types.discovery_hint: creator/review/explainer channels in the niche; check sponsor history + engagement

channel_types.label: Communities
channel_types.discovery_hint: active groups where the ICP gathers; check member count, activity, self-promo rules

channel_types.label: Partnerships
channel_types.discovery_hint: complementary products, integrations, associations, strategic alliances

channel_types.label: Affiliates
channel_types.discovery_hint: affiliate/referral programs to join or a program to launch

channel_types.label: Newsletters
channel_types.discovery_hint: sponsorship-friendly newsletters; subscriber count + ad rates if published

channel_types.label: Podcasts
channel_types.discovery_hint: guest-appearance or sponsorship podcasts; downloads/ranking + guest model

channel_types.label: Events
channel_types.discovery_hint: conferences/meetups; attendee count + sponsorship tiers + audience fit

channel_types.label: Leads
channel_types.discovery_hint: potential customer companies (B2B); fit + buying signal

channel_types.label: Paid Channels
channel_types.discovery_hint: ad platforms/placements a competitor demonstrably runs; CPM band

competitor_intel_dimensions._doc: Loop 2 attempts to fill each of these per competitor. Missing dimensions are logged, never fabricated.

influencer_tiers._doc: Mission's Phase 3 tiers. Assigned in Loop 5 from VERIFIED follower count only. If size is Unverified, tier is 'unknown' and reach cannot be scored above neutral.

dynamic_discovery._doc: Loop 6 may PROPOSE a new product-specific channel type rather than force-fit a coherent cluster into an existing one (e.g. APP_STORE_ASO for a mobile app, BROKER_INTEGRATION for an investing product). Gated to prevent tab churn.
dynamic_discovery.naming: UPPER_SNAKE id, human label, single emoji icon, a report section name
